text:
N0450D_GDR_DOCD_CONTRA_SW N0450D_GDR_DOCD_CONTRA_SW N0450D GDR Physician Documented Contraindicated CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates whether a physician has documented a gradual dose reduction (GDR) as
clinically contraindicated. 0=No
1=Yes
^=Blank (Skip Pattern) effective 10/01/2017
694 N0450E_GRADUAL_PHYSN_DOCD_DT N0450E_GRADUAL_PHYSN_DOCD_DT N0450E Gradual Physician Documented Date CHAR 8 The data in this column indicates the date a physician documented a gradual dose reduction
